---
title: "Hurricane Economic Propagation in Florida"
author: "Pietro Fraccaroli, Gimelgo Xirinda"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Install Missing Packages

```{r install, eval=FALSE}
# Run this chunk once to install everything, then set eval=FALSE
cran_pkgs <- c(
  "sf", "spdep", "tigris",
  "blackmarbler",
  "tidyverse", "lubridate",
  "plm",
  "glasso", "huge",
  "ggplot2", "viridis"
)

install.packages(setdiff(cran_pkgs, rownames(installed.packages())))
```

---

## Libraries

```{r libraries}
# Spatial
library(sf)         # simple features: read/manipulate shapefiles
library(spdep)      # spatial dependence: contiguity matrix, spatial lags
library(tigris)     # download Census TIGER/Line shapefiles (counties, etc.)

# Nighttime lights (NASA Black Marble VIIRS — VNP46A3 monthly product)
library(blackmarbler)

# Data wrangling
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# Panel regression
library(plm)        # fixed-effects panel models

# Graphical Lasso
library(glasso)
library(huge)       # optional: BIC/EBIC tuning for rho selection

# Visualization
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)    # color scale for maps
```

---

## Florida Counties

```{r florida-counties}
# Download Florida county boundaries from Census TIGER/Line
# tigris caches the shapefile after first download
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

florida <- counties(state = "FL", cb = TRUE, year = 2020) |>
  st_transform(crs = 4326)   # WGS84

# Quick check
cat("Number of counties:", nrow(florida), "\n")
cat("Columns:", paste(names(florida), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Preview map
ggplot(florida) +
  geom_sf(fill = "lightblue", color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Florida Counties (n = 67)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r florida-counties-df}
# Compute county centroids and build a clean reference dataframe
florida_counties <- florida |>
  st_centroid() |>
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geometry)[, 1],
    lat = st_coordinates(geometry)[, 2]
  ) |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  select(GEOID, NAME, lon, lat) |>
  arrange(NAME)

View(florida_counties)
```
```{r}
# save the dataframe of florida counties for later use
saveRDS(florida_counties, file = "../Data/florida_counties.rds")
```
---

## Nighttime Lights (VIIRS Black Marble)

```{r ntl-setup}
# NASA Earthdata bearer token — register free at https://urs.earthdata.nasa.gov
# Store your token in .Renviron as: NASA_TOKEN=your_token_here
# Then load it with:
nasa_token <- Sys.getenv("NASA_TOKEN")

# Date range: cover Irma (2017), Michael (2018), Ian (2022)
date_start <- "2015-01-01"
date_end   <- "2023-12-01"
```

```{r ntl-download, eval=FALSE}
# Download monthly nighttime light radiance (VNP46A3) for Florida counties
# blackmarbler extracts and aggregates to the polygon level (mean radiance per county)
ntl_raw <- bm_extract(
  roi                = florida,                 # sf object — one row per county
  product_id         = "VNP46A3",               # monthly composite
  date               = seq(as.Date(date_start), as.Date(date_end), by = "month"),
  bearer             = nasa_token,
  variable           = "AllAngle_Composite_Snow_Free",  # cloud-free monthly mean
  aggregation_fun    = mean,
  output_location_type = "memory"
)

# Save to disk to avoid re-downloading
saveRDS(ntl_raw, file = "../Data/ntl_raw.rds")
```

```{r ntl-load}
# Load cached data (run the download chunk once, then use this)
# ntl_raw <- readRDS("../Data/ntl_raw.rds")

# Expected structure: one row per county × month
# Columns: GEOID, date, ntl_mean (radiance)
# glimpse(ntl_raw)
```
